name: Leonardo Veggie Spirelli, Bacon and Bell Pepper Sauce
recipeIngredient: 1 lb Leonardo Veggie Spirelli (spiral multicolor pasta)
1/2 lb Thick sliced bacon (cut into 1/2-inch pieces)
2 Red bell peppers (seeded and thinly sliced)
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large skillet, sauté the bacon until it is cooked to taste or crispy on the edges.
2. Add the chopped onion and continue cooking for 3-4 minutes until it begins to brown slightly.
3. Stir in the sliced red bell peppers, salt, and pepper. Cook for an additional 2 minutes, stirring occasionally.
4. Drain and rinse the Leonardo Veggie Spirelli according to package directions.
5. Pour the prepared sauce over the pasta and toss well to coat.
6. Add grated Parmesan cheese and toss again.
7. Stir in the butter and chopped parsley, tossing to combine.
8. Serve hot. Makes 6 servings.
